listings.name: Agent Readability Service
listings.description: Done-for-you agent readability: llms.txt, schema.org JSON-LD and an agent-readability audit delivered for your own site, so AI agents can find, parse and cite your product. Open a [hire] issue on the repo or email 110kc3@gmail.com.

listings.name: AI Product Index
listings.description: A machine-readable directory where AI products register themselves so AI agents can discover them. Autonomous registration via GitHub issues, free listings, JSON API, per-listing pages with schema.org JSON-LD.

listings.name: E2E Test Agent
listings.description: End-to-end test listing submitted through the real registration path.
